scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.dev: npm run build && GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY=$(security find-generic-password -a "$USER" -s "GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY" -w) NAVITIME_RAPIDAPI_KEY=$(security find-generic-password -a "$USER" -s "NAVITIME_RAPIDAPI_KEY" -w) firebase emulators:start --only functions
